comment: 50yo female, anatomical pathologist with 20 years documented occupational formaldehyde (HCHO + formalin) exposure in histology / gross-room settings. No personal formaldehyde-attributable malignancy diagnosis. IARC Group 1 carcinogen (Monograph 100F, 2012) — nasopharyngeal carcinoma (latency 20-40y) + myeloid leukemia / AML (latency 5-15y) primary endpoints. Engine fires RF-OCC-FORMALDEHYDE-PREVENTION → routes to 2-track PreventionPlan: standard = continued PPE/respiratory protection if active, routine CBC for leukemia surveillance, ENT symptom awareness + low-threshold nasopharyngeal exam; aggressive = annual CBC + baseline nasopharyngoscopy + symptom-prompted MRI. Validates v0.3 occupational batch-2 pilot. Anchored DIS-AML + DIS-HNSCC.
